data.reasoningText:
Now I understand the project. Let me analyze what needs to change for xUnit.net v3 migration:

1. **Package references**: In xUnit v3, the separate packages `xunit.abstractions`, `xunit.extensibility.core`, and `xunit.extensibility.execution` are consolidated into `xunit.v3`. The runner package `xunit.runner.visualstudio` is replaced by `xunit.runner.visualstudio` v3 or the new `xunit.v3` meta-package handles it.

2. **Namespace changes**: `Xunit.Abstractions` namespace is gone in v3. 

`ITestOutputHelper` moves to the `Xunit` namespace directly. For extensibility authors, the packages are split between `xunit.v3.extensibility` for custom extensions and `xunit.v3` for test projects themselves, with the Visual Studio runner also updated to v3.x.

3. **global.json**: The test runner configuration may need updating. The main package for v3 is `xunit.v3`, which consolidates all the previous separate packages, and `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` is still needed for VSTest integration. Types that were in `Xunit.Abstractions` have moved directly into the `Xunit` namespace, including `ITestOutputHelper`. with the migration steps, I need to verify the current version of xunit.v3 on NuGet to ensure I'm recommending the right package version.

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
Contents of https://www.nuget.org/packages/xunit.v3:
*   [README](#readme-body-tab)
*   [Frameworks](#supportedframeworks-body-tab)
*   [Dependencies](#dependencies-body-tab)
*   [Used By](#usedby-body-tab)
*   [Versions](#versions-body-tab)
*   [Release Notes](#releasenotes-body-tab)

## xUnit.net v3

xUnit.net is a developer testing framework, built to support Test Driven Development, with a design goal of extreme simplicity and alignment with framework features. Supports .NET Framework 4.7.2 or later and .NET 8 or later.

Installing this package installs xunit.v3.mtp-v1.

## About xUnit.net

xUnit.net is a free, open source, community-focused unit testing tool for C#, F#, and Visual Basic. xUnit.net v3 supports .NET 8.0 or later, and .NET Framework 4.7.2 or later.

xUnit.net works with the [.NET SDK](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download) command line tools, [Visual Studio](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/), [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/), [JetBrains Rider](https://www.jetbrains.com/rider/), [NCrunch](https://www.ncrunch.net/), and any development environment compatible with [Microsoft Testing Platform](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/testing/microsoft-testing-platform-intro) or [VSTest](https://github.com/microsoft/vstest).

xUnit.net is part of the [.NET Foundation](https://www.dotnetfoundation.org/) and operates under their [code of conduct](https://www.dotnetfoundation.org/code-of-conduct). It is licensed under [Apache 2](https://opensource.org/licenses/Apache-2.0) (an OSI approved license). The project is [governed](https://xunit.net/governance) by a Project Lead.

For project documentation, please visit the [xUnit.net project home](https://xunit.net/).

*   _New to xUnit.net? Get started with the [.NET SDK](https://xunit.net/docs/getting-started/v3/getting-started)._
*   _Need some help building the source? See [BUILDING.md](https://github.com/xunit/xunit/tree/main/BUILDING.md)._
*   _Want to contribute to the project? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/xunit/.github/tree/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)._
*   _Want to contribute to the assertion library? See the [suggested contribution workflow](https://github.com/xunit/assert.xunit/tree/main/README.md#suggested-contribution-workflow) in the assertion library project, as it is slightly more complex due to code being spread across two GitHub repositories._

[![Powered by NDepend](https://raw.github.com/xunit/media/main/powered-by-ndepend-transparent.png)](http://www.ndepend.com/)

### Latest Builds

Latest stable

Latest CI ([how to use](https://xunit.net/docs/using-ci-builds))

Build status

data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Let me apply all the migration changes:

1. **Packages**: Replace the 4 v2 packages with `xunit.v3` (3.2.2)
2. **Project**: Add `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` (v3 projects are self-contained executables)
3. **Code**: Remove `Xunit.Abstractions` namespace (types moved to `Xunit`)
4. **global.json**: Remove VSTest runner config

arguments.old_str:
<PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.abstractions" Version="2.0.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.extensibility.core" Version="2.9.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.extensibility.execution" Version="2.9.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.2" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="18.3.0" />
  </ItemGroup>

data.reasoningText:
The latest version of `xunit.v3` is 3.2.2 (based on the dependency shown: `xunit.v3.mtp-v1 (= 3.2.2)`). Now I have all the information I need.

Key changes for migration:

1. **Replace packages**: Remove `xunit.abstractions`, `xunit.extensibility.core`, `xunit.extensibility.execution`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` → Add `xunit.v3` version 3.2.2
2. **Project type**: xUnit v3 test projects are executables, so add `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>`


3. **Namespace updates**: The `Xunit.Abstractions` namespace is now just `Xunit`, so I'll need to update the using statements and references like `ITestOutputHelper`
4. **Configuration cleanup**: Remove the VSTest runner configuration from global.json since v3 uses the Microsoft Testing Platform instead

Now I'm ready to implement these changes.

using Xunit;

namespace MyApp.Tests;

public class OutputLogger
{
    private readonly ITestOutputHelper _output;

    public OutputLogger(ITestOutputHelper output)
    {
        _output = output;
    }

    public void Log(string message) => _output.WriteLine(message);
}
---
{
}

data.content:
Build succeeded. Here's a summary of the migration changes:

| Change | v2 | v3 |
|---|---|---|
| **Packages** | `xunit.abstractions`, `xunit.extensibility.core`, `.execution`, `runner.visualstudio`, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` | Single `xunit.v3` (3.2.2) |
| **Output type** | Library (default) | `Exe` (v3 tests are self-contained executables) |
| **Namespace** | `Xunit.Abstractions` | Removed — `ITestOutputHelper` now lives in `Xunit` |
| **global.json** | VSTest runner | Cleared (v3 uses Microsoft Testing Platform) |
